dissolve.example: Sugar dissolves quickly in hot water.

distinction.example: There is a clear distinction between the two.
distinction.example_zh: 這兩者之間有明顯的區別。

distinctive.example: The bird has a distinctive song.

distract.example: Loud music can distract you from studying.
distract.example_zh: 大聲的音樂會讓你念書分心。

doctrine.example: The students learned about the doctrine.
doctrine.example_zh: 學生們學習了這項教義。

document.example: She documented her trip with photos.

documentary.example: We watched a documentary about wild animals.
documentary.example_zh: 我們看了一部關於野生動物的紀錄片。

domain.example: Science is her area of domain.

dome.example: The building has a golden dome.
dome.example_zh: 這棟建築有個金色的圓頂。

donate.example: They donated old clothes to charity.
donate.example_zh: 他們把舊衣服捐給慈善機構。

donation.example: Her donation helped build the library.
donation.example_zh: 她的捐款幫助建了圖書館。

donor.example: A generous donor paid for the new park.
donor.example_zh: 一位慷慨的捐贈者出資建了新公園。

doorway.example: She stood in the doorway and waved.

dough.example: She kneaded the dough to make bread.

dreadful.example: The weather was dreadful all weekend.

driveway.example: He parked the car in the driveway.

drought.example: The long drought killed many crops.
drought.example_zh: 長期乾旱毀了許多作物。

ecology.example: She studies the ecology of the rainforest.

ecosystem.example: A pond is a small ecosystem.
ecosystem.example_zh: 一座池塘就是一個小型生態系統。

elaborate.example: She made an elaborate plan for the party.
elaborate.example_zh: 她為派對訂了一個周詳的計畫。

elaborate.example: Could you elaborate on your idea?
elaborate.example_zh: 你能詳細說明你的想法嗎？

eligible.example: You are eligible to apply for the prize.

eloquent.example_zh: 她發表了一場雄辯的演說。

embrace.example: They embraced after the long trip.

embrace.example_zh: 她欣然接受了這個新想法。

emission.example: The factory must reduce its emissions.
emission.example_zh: 這家工廠必須減少排放。

endorse.example: A famous star endorsed the product.
endorse.example_zh: 一位知名明星為這產品代言。

enthusiastic.example: The fans were loud and enthusiastic.

entitle.example: This ticket entitles you to a free drink.
entitle.example_zh: 這張票讓你可免費獲得一杯飲料。

entity.example: The club is a separate entity from the school.
entity.example_zh: 這個社團是獨立於學校的實體。

entrepreneur.example: The young entrepreneur started a tech company.
entrepreneur.example_zh: 那位年輕的創業家創立了一家科技公司。

envious.example: She was envious of her sister's prize.

envision.example_zh: 他展望一個更乾淨的未來。

epidemic.example: The town fought to stop the epidemic.

episode.example: I watched the first episode of the show.
episode.example_zh: 我看了這部劇的第一集。

episode.example: It was a sad episode in her life.
episode.example_zh: 那是她人生中一段悲傷的經歷。

equation.example: She solved the math equation quickly.
equation.example_zh: 她很快解開了那道數學方程式。

equity.example: The school treats all students with equity.
equity.example_zh: 學校公平對待所有學生。

equivalent.example: One dollar is equivalent to thirty here.
equivalent.example_zh: 一美元在這裡相當於三十元。

equivalent.example: There is no equivalent in English.

erect.example: They erected a tent in the field.
erect.example_zh: 他們在田裡搭起一頂帳篷。

errand.example: She ran an errand for her mother.

erupt.example: The volcano could erupt at any time.
erupt.example_zh: 這座火山隨時可能噴發。

escalator.example: We took the escalator to the second floor.

essence.example: Kindness is the essence of her character.

estate.example: He inherited a large estate from his uncle.
estate.example_zh: 他從叔叔那裡繼承了一大片地產。

ethic.example: Hard work is part of his work ethic.
ethic.example_zh: 努力工作是他職業道德的一部分。

ethical.example: It is not ethical to copy others' work.
ethical.example_zh: 抄襲別人的作品是不道德的。

evolution.example: We studied the evolution of animals.

exaggeration.example: Saying it took forever is an exaggeration.
exaggeration.example_zh: 說它花了一輩子是種誇張。

exceed.example: Do not exceed the speed limit.

exceptional.example: She has exceptional talent in music.
exceptional.example_zh: 她在音樂上有卓越的天賦。

excessive.example: Excessive sugar is bad for you.

exclaim.example: She exclaimed in surprise at the gift.
exclaim.example_zh: 看到禮物她驚喜地叫了出來。

exclude.example: Please don't exclude anyone from the game.
exclude.example_zh: 請別把任何人排除在遊戲之外。

exclusive.example: The club is exclusive to members.

execute.example: The team executed the plan perfectly.
execute.example_zh: 團隊完美地執行了計畫。

execution.example: The execution of the project was smooth.

executive.example: She is a busy company executive.
executive.example_zh: 她是個忙碌的公司主管。
